backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the AO Farms dairy backend, defining types (Cattle, CustomerAccount, CattleOrder, MilkProductionRecord, InventoryItem) and state maps, with admin bootstrapping via adminLogin and full CRUD endpoints for cattle, customers, orders, milk production, and inventory.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (nav bar, dashboard hero, stat cards, charts, management pages) to their source files, component dependencies, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries for each frontend source file, serving as a pre-built reference for the project's frontend file contents and purposes.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, primary, card, sidebar, and chart color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app, mounting the root div and loading the main TypeScript entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (login, dashboard, cattle, milk, inventory, customers, deliveries, reports) wrapped in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and CustomerAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminCattleManag: Admin cattle management card component with a sortable table, availability dropdown, and add/edit/delete dialogs backed by useGetAllCattle, useDeleteCattle, and useUpdateCattle hooks.
frontend/src/components/AdminCustomerMan: Admin UI component for managing customer accounts, supporting add, edit, delete, and active/inactive toggling via a table with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/components/AdminOrdersDeliv: Admin UI component that lists all cattle orders with status badges and allows editing order status and delivery notes via a dialog.
frontend/src/components/CattleForm.tsx: Dialog form component for adding or editing a cattle record, with fields for tag number, breed, purchase date/price, availability, and health status.
frontend/src/components/CattleHealthChar: Renders a donut pie chart showing the distribution of cattle health statuses (Healthy, Sick, Recovered) using Recharts.
frontend/src/components/CustomerDelivery: Displays a table of a customer's cattle orders with status badges, order date, cattle tag, and delivery notes.
frontend/src/components/CustomerFeedback: Stub component that renders nothing, kept to prevent import errors from references to the now-removed feedback dialog.
frontend/src/components/CustomerForm.tsx: Dialog form component for adding or editing a customer account, with fields for name, phone, address, username, password, and active status.
frontend/src/components/CustomerMyDelive: Displays a table of a customer's cattle orders with status badges, order dates, and delivery notes, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state when no orders exist.
frontend/src/components/CustomerPlaceOrd: Provides a form for customers to place a new cattle order by selecting an available animal and optionally adding delivery notes, using React Query mutations and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/DeliveryQuantity: Stub component that replaced the delivery quantity chart; renders a placeholder message since delivery records are no longer available in the new backend.
frontend/src/components/FlaggedFeedbackS: Stub component that renders nothing, replacing the flagged feedback section which is no longer applicable with the new backend.
frontend/src/components/InventoryForm.ts: Modal dialog form for adding or editing an inventory item, supporting fields like name, category, quantity, unit, low-stock threshold, and notes, with add/update mutations and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application shell with a sticky top navigation bar containing logo, desktop and mobile nav links for admin routes, and a sign-out button for authenticated admins.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionCh: Stub component that renders a placeholder message, replacing the milk production chart since milk records are no longer available in the new backend.
frontend/src/components/MilkProductionTr: Renders a Recharts line chart of daily aggregated milk production in liters, derived from an array of MilkProductionRecord objects sorted and grouped by date.
frontend/src/components/ProductCatalog.t: Displays a static grid catalog of farm products (milk and dairy) grouped by category, with pricing, descriptions, and a 'Popular' badge for highlighted items.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and saves it via the backend actor's `saveCallerUserProfile` mutation, invalidating the current user profile query on success.
frontend/src/components/ResolveFeedbackD: A stub component that renders nothing, kept only to prevent import errors from code that previously referenced a resolve-feedback dialog.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppMessageM: A stub component that renders nothing, kept only to prevent import errors from code that previously referenced a WhatsApp message modal.
frontend/src/context/CustomerAuthContext: Provides a React context for customer session management, persisting session data (with BigInt serialization) to sessionStorage and exposing login/logout helpers.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with an authenticated or anonymous identity and invalidating all dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for all admin operations including role checks, cattle CRUD, customer management, orders, milk production records, and inventory, each delegating to the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipboard.ts: A small hook that wraps the Clipboard API to copy text, tracking copied state and errors with an auto-reset delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for customer-facing operations: client-side login by matching credentials, fetching the caller's orders, listing available cattle, and placing orders.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using `@dfinity/auth-client`, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Re-exports all admin and customer query hooks and adds a convenience `useIsAdmin` hook that queries the backend for the caller's admin status.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Google Fonts, and defines a farm-themed CSS custom property palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/localTypes.ts: An empty file, likely a placeholder for future local TypeScript type definitions.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider`.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLogin.tsx: Admin login page that authenticates via Internet Identity, then calls the backend `adminLogin()` to verify admin access and navigates to the dashboard on success, displaying appropriate error messages for full slots or unauthorized access.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPanel.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed navigation for Cattle, Customers, Orders & Deliveries, and Reports sections, guarded by an admin role check that redirects to the login page if unauthorized.
frontend/src/pages/CattleManagement.tsx: Admin-only page displaying cattle inventory stats (total, available, sold, healthy) and embedding the AdminCattleManagement component, with a redirect to login if the caller is not an admin.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLogin.tsx: Customer login page with username/password form that calls the login mutation, extracts a customer ID from the session token, stores the session via CustomerAuthContext, and navigates to the customer portal.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerManagement.ts: Admin-only page showing customer stats (total, active, inactive) and embedding the AdminCustomerManagement component, redirecting to login if the caller lacks admin privileges.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerPortal.tsx: Authenticated customer portal with tabs for placing orders and viewing personal deliveries, filtering all orders by the logged-in customer's ID and redirecting to login if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays summary stat cards (cattle, milk production, inventory, orders) and a 7-day milk production trend chart, redirecting non-admins to the login page.
frontend/src/pages/DeliveryReports.tsx: Admin-protected page that renders the AdminOrdersDeliveries component for tracking and managing cattle orders and deliveries.
frontend/src/pages/InventoryManagement.t: Admin-protected page for managing farm inventory items, supporting add/edit/delete operations with stats cards and a table view with low-stock indicators.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelection.tsx: Landing page presenting a hero banner and two login option cards (Admin and Customer) that navigate to their respective login routes.
frontend/src/pages/MilkProduction.tsx: Admin-protected page for managing milk production records with a sortable table, add/edit dialog form, delete confirmation, stats cards, and a trend chart.
frontend/src/pages/MonthlyReports.tsx: Admin-protected page that groups all orders by month into collapsible sections, showing per-month delivery status counts and individual order details.
frontend/src/utils/csvExport.ts: Utility module providing functions to export customers, cattle, and orders data as downloadable CSV files, plus stub functions for removed export types.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappMessageFormat: Formats a WhatsApp delivery confirmation message for AO Farms and generates a wa.me URL with the encoded message for a given phone number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including farm, admin, sidebar, and chart palettes), border radii, and box shadows for the AO Farms UI.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the AO Farms dairy management system project, including implemented features, architectural notes, known build issues, and image requirements across versioned incremental builds.
